column1: # Fill one row per graph. Paths may be absolute or relative to the repository root.
# graph IDs should be file-safe: letters, digits, dots, underscores, and dashes.
# gfaidx_path_names_file is optional. If present, it should be produced by:
# and filtered to the P/W records to coordinate-index.
# gfaidx_reference is optional and is used only when gfaidx_path_names_file is empty.
# odgi_path_indexes defaults to true. Set it to 0/false for graphs with no P/W
# paths, because odgi pathindex can abort on pathless graphs.
